snp5.3:1.1: Who here in the world is contented?
snp5.3:1.6: Whom do you call a great person?
snp5.3:1.7: Who here has gone past the seamstress?— craving.
snp5.3:2.1:
The Buddha:
He who in the midst of sensualities, follows the holy life,
snp5.3:2.4: the monk who is —through fathoming things— unbound:
snp5.3:3.1: He, the thinker knowing both sides,
snp5.3:3.3:
I call a great person.
He
snp5.3:3.4:
here has gone past the seamstress:
craving.
